scripts.build: tsc && cp extention/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp extention/brands.json dist/brands.json && cp extention/styles.css dist/styles.css && mkdir -p dist/sidepanel && cp extention/sidepanel/sidepanel.html dist/sidepanel/ && cp extention/sidepanel/sidepanel.css dist/sidepanel/ && cp extention/sidepanel/mock-chat-data.json dist/sidepanel/
scripts.build:win: tsc && copy extention\manifest.json dist\manifest.json && copy extention\brands.json dist\brands.json && copy extention\styles.css dist\styles.css && if not exist dist\sidepanel mkdir dist\sidepanel && copy extention\sidepanel\sidepanel.html dist\sidepanel\ && copy extention\sidepanel\sidepanel.css dist\sidepanel\
